name: Revolution Day (Egypt)
traditions: Presidential address; military displays; cultural performances; fireworks over the Nile; patriotic concerts.
historicalBackground: Revolution Day commemorates the Egyptian Revolution of 1952, when the Free Officers Movement led by Gamal Abdel Nasser overthrew the monarchy.
description: Egypt's celebration of the 1952 Revolution, with military displays and fireworks along the Nile honoring the birth of the republic.
